# The Artifact — Ahmed Taha's Portfolio

> Personal portfolio site for Ahmed Taha, a full-stack engineer and AI architect based in Cairo, Egypt.

## Overview

This is a single-page portfolio website built with Astro 5 and Tailwind CSS 4, deployed on Cloudflare Pages. The design system is called "The Forensic Monolith" — a clinical, dark-mode terminal aesthetic inspired by intelligence dossiers and forensic evidence boards.

## Owner

- **Name:** Ahmed Taha
- **Location:** Cairo, Egypt
- **GitHub:** github.com/SufficientDaikon
- **Email:** tahaa755@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn:** linkedin.com/in/ahmed-taha225
- **Bio:** Full-stack engineer and AI architect with 62+ repositories, 17 autonomous agents, and a compiler built from scratch.

## Tech Stack

- **Framework:** Astro 5 (islands architecture — supports React, Svelte, Vue, SolidJS islands)
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS 4 via @tailwindcss/vite
- **Language:** TypeScript (strict)
- **Deployment:** Cloudflare Pages
- **Fonts:** Manrope (headlines), Inter (body), Space Grotesk (labels/data)
- **Icons:** Material Symbols Outlined, weight 200

## Architecture

The site uses Astro's islands architecture. Static HTML is generated at build time with zero client-side JavaScript by default. Interactive components hydrate independently as islands. The project is designed to progressively adopt React, Svelte, Vue, or SolidJS for specific components where those frameworks excel.

### Framework Selection

| Use Case | Framework | File Pattern |
|----------|-----------|--------------|
| Static content, layout, SEO | Astro (.astro) | `src/components/*.astro` |
| Real-time reactive UI, canvas effects | SolidJS (.tsx) | `src/components/solid/*.tsx` |
| 3D scenes, WebGL, Three.js | React + R3F (.tsx) | `src/components/react/*.tsx` |
| Scroll animations, transitions | Svelte (.svelte) | `src/components/svelte/*.svelte` |
| Interactive inspectors, galleries | Vue (.vue) | `src/components/vue/*.vue` |

### Cross-Framework State

nanostores atoms shared between all frameworks via bindings (@nanostores/react, @nanostores/solid, @nanostores/vue, Svelte native $).

## Design System: The Forensic Monolith

### Principles
- Clinical, surgical precision — not friendly
- Ultra-dark surfaces with Electric Cyan (#00F0FF) accent at <5% screen coverage
- Zero border radius — all sharp corners
- No 1px borders — depth via background color tonal shifts
- Uppercase, wide-tracked typography
- Material Symbols Outlined icons at weight 200

### Color Palette
- Surfaces: #0e0e0e → #131313 → #1c1b1b → #201f1f → #2a2a2a → #353534 → #3a3939
- Primary accent: #00F0FF (Electric Cyan)
- Text: #E5E2E1 (primary), #C8C6C5 (secondary), #B9CACB (muted)
- Ghost borders: #3B494B at 15% opacity

## Site Sections

1. **Header** — Fixed top navigation bar
2. **Sidebar** — Left sidebar (desktop only, 256px) with stats and nav
3. **Hero** — Intro with HUD overlays, hex data streams, coordinate readout
4. **Tech Ticker** — Scrolling technology stack marquee
5. **Case Study: Archon** — Cross-platform AI skills framework (83 skills, 10 agents, 5 platforms)
6. **Case Study: Aether** — Autonomous multi-agent orchestration (28 subsystems)
7. **Axon Note** — Side project: ML/AI-first programming language in Rust
8. **Metrics** — Performance grid with neural network canvas and radar sweep
9. **Timeline** — DNA helix timeline with 6 career milestones (2020-2025)
10. **Contact** — CTA section with interactive terminal emulator
11. **Footer** — Status bar with version and location

## Visual Effects

The site features extensive client-side visual systems:
- Code Rain (Matrix-style falling characters)
- Boot sequence terminal animation
- Custom crosshair cursor with guide lines
- Magnetic buttons with hover attraction
- 3D tilt cards on hover
- Scroll-triggered reveal animations
- Interactive terminal (commands: help, about, stack, projects, contact, clear)
- Neural network canvas animation
- Radar sweep with animated blips
- EMP expanding rings
- Signal strength bars
- Holographic card sheen effects
- DNA helix timeline with alternating cards
- Parallax scrolling

## File Structure

```
src/
  layouts/Layout.astro       — Base HTML, fonts, all JS visual systems
  pages/index.astro           — Main page composition
  components/
    Header.astro              — Fixed top nav
    Sidebar.astro             — Left sidebar with stats
    Hero.astro                — Hero with HUD overlays
    TechTicker.astro          — Scrolling tech marquee
    SectionDivider.astro      — Section break labels
    CaseStudy.astro           — Reusable project showcase
    Metrics.astro             — Stats grid with neural canvas
    Timeline.astro            — DNA helix career timeline
    Contact.astro             — CTA + terminal
    Footer.astro              — Status footer
  styles/global.css           — Tailwind v4 @theme tokens
tools/
  awwwards_server.py          — Awwwards scraper MCP server
```

## Featured Projects

### Archon — The Architect
Cross-platform AI skills framework. 83 production skills, 10 specialized agents, 5 cognitive synapses. Deploys across Claude, Copilot, Cursor, Windsurf, and Antigravity. MIT licensed.

### Aether — The Nexus
Autonomous multi-agent orchestration framework. 28 interconnected subsystems for planning, execution, and self-correcting workflows. Built on Bun and TypeScript. Status: Paused.

### Axon
ML/AI-first systems programming language built in Rust. Compile-time tensor shape validation, ownership-based memory safety, native GPU execution. Full lexer, parser, and borrow checker.

## MCP Servers

The project uses three MCP servers:
- **Google Stitch** — AI design tool for UI generation
- **Awwwards** — Scrapes award-winning portfolio sites for design inspiration
- **Astro Docs** — Official Astro documentation for framework reference
